## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 🧩 New or updated scoring strategy (`app/engine/`)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI / refactor (no functional change)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. -->

```bash
poetry run pytest
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (`black`, `isort`, `ruff`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I added or updated tests, and the suite passes locally
- [ ] Total `app/` coverage stays **≥ 93%** (the CI gate)
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] I agree to follow this project's [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
